researchGrounding: Oracle result 23enr0oj: strict argv proof, protected scope closure, hash-chain heads, CI replay

suites.title: RGR Production Harness Deterministic Evals

checks.summary: Strict mode rejects shell and non-bun argv spoofing.

shell.stderr: red --strict requires argv command proof after --. Legacy --cmd is not authoritative.

argv.stderr: Strict command proof v1 only supports direct `bun test` commands.

result.stderr: --test must point to a root test file, not src/calc.ts

checks.summary: Imported helpers are protected before Green.

red.stdout:
Red captured: cycle 001
Protected files: package.json, src/calc.test.ts, src/test-utils/make-calc.ts
Failure kind: assertion

green.stderr:
Protected Red test files changed. RGR cannot prove Green against the same Red test.
- cycle 001: src/test-utils/make-calc.ts expected 6f6c120d168b2ff9069009563fa3a51956f86942bee6429852f5b1948a7cbc02, actual ee9b257ce4d6f95e7609c349d90da60b6eb541033d9f1fd1bf243a9cf933710c
If the test was wrong, run rgr revise-test --reason "<why>" and capture a new Red proof.

changedGreen.stderr: Strict Green must run the exact Red command. Use Refactor/Verify for broader commands.

notes: Tier 1 deterministic suite; no model judge.
Each check creates a fresh git repository and runs the real local RGR CLI.
